article_title: 一位资深 .NET 开发者的 20+ 条实战建议：从 DI、Async 到 EF Core 优化
core_theme: 20+ 条来自生产环境的 .NET 10 实战建议，覆盖依赖注入、异步编程、EF Core 优化、CancellationToken、缓存、安全、异常处理等核心领域
reader_takeaway: 获得一份可随时查阅的 .NET 最佳实践清单，每条建议都有 bad/good 代码对比和作者的真实生产判断
summary_angle: 把「踩坑 → 总结 → 形成最佳实践」的资深开发者经验沉淀做成一张叙事封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头：debug 凌晨两点的 bug、与混乱的遗留代码斗争、从错误中学习
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧混乱的齿轮和故障部件，代表踩过的坑

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 21 条建议：DI、async、EF Core、CancellationToken、缓存等
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央精密的齿轮组/机械结构，每个齿轮代表一条最佳实践

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Key Takeaways：DI 和 async 影响最大、AsNoTracking 2x 提速、HybridCache 是 .NET 10 默认缓存
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧流畅运转的精密机器，产出干净高效的代码

main_metaphor: 一个蒸汽朋克风格的精密工坊——混乱的零件经过经验丰富的匠人之手，变成有序运转的齿轮系统
primary_subject: 一个由多个齿轮和机械零件组成的精密工坊引擎
subject_action: 从左侧散落的零件/故障状态，经过中央齿轮组（最佳实践）的整合，变成右侧流畅运转的精密机器
composition: 居中主结构，左右两侧的 before-after 对比
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: steampunk adventure illustration, brass mechanisms, gears, goggles, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery
selected_style_reason: 随机选中（索引 12）；资深开发者的经验沉淀像匠人的手工艺知识，蒸汽朋克的齿轮机构天然适合表达「实践经验形成精密系统」的隐喻
style_safety_note: 使用泛蒸汽朋克风格描述，不涉及特定作品或设计师
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：蒸汽朋克工坊隐喻是否成立、20+ 数字是否可见、before-after 对比是否清晰
revision_targets: 如果蒸汽朋克元素过密，简化齿轮密度
如果数字 '20+' 看不清，放大标注
如果构图太满，减少背景机械
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration summarizing 20+ battle-tested .NET best practices from a senior developer - covering DI, async, EF Core optimization, cancellation tokens, caching, security, and more. The reader should feel they're getting hard-won production wisdom.

Summary angle: From 'stepping on landmines' to 'distilling best practices' to 'production-grade code' compressed into a readable cover.
Narrative flow: 3-beat before-after process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-3 supporting beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem: scattered broken gears and malfunctioning parts on the left, representing painful lessons learned, labeled with short Chinese text
- Mechanism: a central intricate gear system where each gear represents a best practice (DI, async, EF Core, caching, etc.), with a visible '20+' number, labeled with short Chinese text
- Takeaway: a smoothly running precision machine on the right producing clean efficient output, labeled with short Chinese text

Main metaphor: A steampunk-style craftsman workshop - chaotic parts transformed by experienced hands into an orderly running gear system.
Subject: A precision workshop engine made of multiple brass gears and mechanical components.
Composition/framing: Centered main structure with left-to-right before-after contrast. Keep one dominant focal point.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: steampunk adventure illustration, brass mechanisms, gears, goggles, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery. Stylized, polished, editorial. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: brass gold, bronze brown, warm amber light, dark iron gray.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels plus one numeric fact '20+'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output.
Avoid: neon cityscapes, cyberpunk purple-blue glow, floating chips, code rain, HUD overlays, generic robots, dashboards, fake terminals, fake charts.
